title: Help with spanish audio tracks
wikitext: []: Help with spanish audio tracks             Quote Post by bridgetkeble » Mon Aug 12, 2024 11:07 pm Hello everybody! I´m from Chile, so I knew evangelion when aired on TV in spanish near 2000. After that there was a new latin american dub for the renewal edition, and currently netflix has another dub (yeah, it's a mess). I'm currently trying to make my definitive version of the series in spanish at 1080p (I mean, making my subtitles to match the Japanese audio, and adding all three LA dubs for the tv series), but I can't find the audio for episodes 21-24 (without the director's cut) in the animax audio (the second one). They did all 26 episodes, and the 4 director's cut separately, but right now I just found the DC with that dub. Does anyone have the previous edition for chapters 21 to 24 with the animax dub?

Article: Help with spanish audio tracks
[]: Help with spanish audio tracks             Quote Post by bridgetkeble » Mon Aug 12, 2024 11:07 pm Hello everybody! I´m from Chile, so I knew evangelion when aired on TV in spanish near 2000. After that there was a new latin american dub for the renewal edition, and currently netflix has another dub (yeah, it's a mess). I'm currently trying to make my definitive version of the series in spanish at 1080p (I mean, making my subtitles to match the Japanese audio, and adding all three LA dubs for the tv series), but I can't find the audio for episodes 21-24 (without the director's cut) in the animax audio (the second one). They did all 26 episodes, and the 4 director's cut separately, but right now I just found the DC with that dub. Does anyone have the previous edition for chapters 21 to 24 with the animax dub?
